stem: The population of a bacterial culture decreases each hour by a fixed percent r% of its previous population. If the initial population is P0, which of the following models the population P(t) of the culture t hours later?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. A fixed percent decrease of r% per hour means the new population is (1 − r/100) times the previous one. After t hours, the population is P0(1 − r/100)t.

Choice A would model an increase. Choice B models linear, not exponential, decline. Choice D treats r/100 as the entire base rather than the retention factor.
